title: Senior Plant Manager at Microtek International

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Microtek International
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
